families.shapes: enabled toggle + bezier reference via Preview/Keep/Revert/Save with auto-revert; gated family save
families.styleShape: blocked (no trusted style enumeration — see style-editability)

families.shapes: existing bezier control points via the Bezier Curve Editor; gated family save

families.reason: a monitor record editor with a proven display capture/apply/verify/revert flow (and the display rollback dialog) was not built; a bad monitor line can black the only display on reload. Monitor line stays read-only (e-monitors-page.png).
a bind editor with duplicate/conflict/reserved detection + parser/write/reread + rollback was not built; keybinds are safety-relevant (a bad bind can lock out input).
families.proofRequirement: bind grammar + conflict detection + gated family write/reread

families.reason: no trusted runtime readback listing exists on this compositor version to capture original state; grammar-only save-only editor was not built this pass.
families.proofRequirement: trusted gesture grammar + gated family write

families.reason: per-device record editor + save-only staging for unavailable hardware was not built; device records reconfigure input hardware.
a permission editor with strict source-backed validators + parser/write/reread was not built; a wrong permission line silently grants/denies privileged protocol access.
families.proofRequirement: source-backed permission grammar + validator + gated family write/reread

honestNote: Building five new structured-family editors (each with grammar, validation, add/edit/remove, gated family write/reread, and live GUI proof) is a large multi-subsystem effort that was not completed or proven in this pass. They are reported as not-editable-this-pass with concrete proof requirements rather than claimed as done. hl.animation/hl.curve remain editable-supervised as before.
